headline: PNC Grant To Sesame Workshop And What It Means For Investors
summary: PNC Foundation has announced a major multi-year grant to Sesame Workshop to support early childhood education initiatives. The partnership connects NYSE:PNC with a globally recognized children’s education organization focused on community impact. For a bank the size of PNC Financial Services Group, community investment sits alongside its core businesses in retail, commercial, and institutional banking. This new grant adds to the company’s broader community development activity at a time...
